code.text: Specimen information

text.div:
Specimen information

Test03-JUN-2020Specimen
Appearance of UrineCloudy urineUrine
Odor of UrineUrine smell ammoniacalUrine
Clarity of UrineTranslucentUrine
Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated serum creatinine, proteinuria, and low urine specific gravity, suggesting impaired renal function. Urine findings (cloudy, brown, ammoniacal odor, ketonuria, bilirubinuria, glucosuria) further support possible renal and/or hepatic dysfunction. HbA1c is low, indicating no chronic hyperglycemia. No evidence of urinary tract infection. Recommend further evaluation of renal and hepatic status.
